implementationSummary: Added backfill_product_partition in product_partition.py: one calendar-day A-34 paginated fetch (start_date_ge/end_date_lt window), budget-governed Partner calls, grain=product upserts via expand_analytics_product_list_item + transform_for_channel, mark_complete only after all pages succeed, mark_failed on mid-pagination TikTokAPIError. Module docstring and MODULE.md defer Impressions/Views (no A-33). Four fixture-based unit tests; no live Partner HTTP.
assumptions: A-34 list payload uses total_performance window totals per product (not daily intervals)
Budget exhaustion returns early without mark_complete; orchestrator resumes on next run
